body.description: A fully accessible, cross-browser HTML5 media player library that supports captions, audio descriptions, and sign language tracks, designed to be inclusive for users with disabilities.
body.mainText:
Back
Favorite
Bookmarked
Share
Suggest Edit
Able Player
Players & Clients
Mobile & Web Players
approved
Visit Resource
Description
A fully accessible, cross-browser HTML5 media player library that supports captions, audio descriptions, and sign language tracks, designed to be inclusive for users with disabilities.
URL
https://ableplayer.github.io/ableplayer
Added on 1/20/2026
Edit in Admin
Resource ID: 186609
Quick Actions
Open Resource
Share This Page
Add to Favorites
Remove Bookmark
Related Resources
Resources you might find interesting
jPlayer

A jQuery-based media library that can be used to build web audio and video players. jPlayer abstracts the HTML5 <video> and <audio> elements and provides a consistent API, with a Flash fallback (for older browsers) and skinnable UI via CSS.

65% match
Why recommended:
Same subcategory: Mobile & Web Players
4 shared keywords
SJVideoPlayer

An open source media player library for iOS that provides a customizable player interface. It supports multiple backends (AVPlayer, IJKPlayer, etc.) and features like gesture controls and picture-in-picture.

60% match
Why recommended:
Same subcategory: Mobile & Web Players
3 shared keywords
Doikki/DKVid

body.description: Sophisticated web-based video player implementing advanced ABR algorithms including BOLA (Buffer Occupancy based Lyapunov Algorithm) and bandwidth-based strategies. Features MSE-based streaming, dual EWMA bandwidth estimation, and intelligent quality switching.
body.mainText:
Back
Favorite
Bookmarked
Share
Suggest Edit
ABR Video Player
Protocols & Transport
Adaptive Bitrate Algorithms & Tools
approved
Visit Resource
Description
Sophisticated web-based video player implementing advanced ABR algorithms including BOLA (Buffer Occupancy based Lyapunov Algorithm) and bandwidth-based strategies. Features MSE-based streaming, dual EWMA bandwidth estimation, and intelligent quality switching.
URL
https://github.com/LennartPaduch/abr-video-player
Added on 7/6/2026
Edit in Admin
Resource ID: 187911
Quick Actions
Open Resource
Share This Page
Add to Favorites
Remove Bookmark
Related Resources
Resources you might find interesting
BOLA: Buffer Occupancy based Lyapunov Algorithm (paper)

Original academic paper introducing the BOLA Lyapunov-based adaptive bitrate algorithm, theoretical foundation for many ABR implementations.

70% match
Why recommended:
Same subcategory: Adaptive Bitrate Algorithms & Tools
5 shared keywords
Sabre — BOLA/MPC ABR Reference Simulator

Reference simulator implementing BOLA and MPC adaptive bitrate algorithms, based on dash.js, widely used in ABR research papers.

60% match
Why recommended:
